answers.author: Champak Roy
answers.content: Use two loops. The outer loop runs from 1 to n. The inner loop prints exactly row stars. In Python, this can also be done with print('*' * row).

answers.author: System Hint
answers.content: for row in range(1, n + 1): print('*' * row)

answers.author: Champak Roy
answers.content: Start from n and move down to 1. On each row, print that many stars. This is the reverse of the first triangle.

answers.author: System Hint
answers.content: for row in range(n, 0, -1): print('*' * row)

answers.author: Champak Roy
answers.content: For every row, print numbers from 1 to row. Keep the inner print on the same line, then print a newline after the inner loop ends.

answers.author: System Hint
answers.content: for row in range(1, n + 1): print(''.join(str(x) for x in range(1, row + 1)))

answers.author: Champak Roy
answers.content: The row number is repeated row times. Convert the row number to a string and multiply it by row.

answers.author: System Hint
answers.content: for row in range(1, n + 1): print(str(row) * row)

answers.author: Champak Roy
answers.content: Each row has spaces first and then stars. For row r, spaces are n - r and stars are 2 * r - 1.

answers.author: System Hint
answers.content: for row in range(1, n + 1): print(' ' * (n - row) + '*' * (2 * row - 1))

answers.author: Champak Roy
answers.content: This is the centered pyramid in reverse. Spaces increase from 0 to n - 1 and stars decrease from 2n - 1 to 1.

answers.author: System Hint
answers.content: for row in range(n, 0, -1): print(' ' * (n - row) + '*' * (2 * row - 1))

answers.author: Champak Roy
answers.content: Print a star when the current cell is on the boundary. Otherwise print a space. Boundary means first row, last row, first column, or last column.

answers.author: System Hint
answers.content: if r == 0 or r == n-1 or c == 0 or c == n-1: print('*', end='')

answers.author: Champak Roy
answers.content: Build each row with left stars, middle spaces, and right stars. The top half grows, then the bottom half shrinks.

answers.author: System Hint
answers.content: top: stars=i, spaces=2*(n-i); bottom: stars=i, spaces=2*(n-i) while i goes downward
